calendar.matters:
Notice Of Heairng And Amended Petition Fro Writ Of Mandate, Or In The Alternative Petition For Writ Of Prohibition
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: E. MICHAEL LINSCHEID, ESQ., 415.782.6002, FOR PETITIONER JOHN RANDALL KNAPP.
ROBERT ANDREW HARKNESS, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, 510.622.2216, FOR RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES.

RULING: Argued and the Court denied PETITIONER JOHN KNAPP's Amended Petition For Writ Of Mandate, Or In The Alternative Petition For Writ Of Prohibition. Order signed in open court. Administrative records submitted for today's hearing are returned to submitting party. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
